## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to a specific EU AI Act article or compliance requirement?

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context
Any other context, screenshots, or references (e.g., specific EU AI Act articles, ISO 42001 controls, NIST AI RMF functions).
